summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PPL Board IPL 2026 live match prediction app. All backend APIs working perfectly, frontend loads correctly with 74 matches, navigation functional, live data generation via GPT working, probability algorithms operational.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection error in console but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns status with scheduleLoaded=true and 74 matches
Backend API /api/schedule returns matches with live/upcoming/completed categories (0 live, 44 upcoming, 30 completed)
Backend API /api/matches/{matchId}/state returns match state correctly
Backend POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live generates live data via GPT successfully
WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/{matchId} connects and receives live updates
Frontend homepage loads with 74 matches and 3 tabs (Live/Upcoming/Completed)
Frontend Completed tab shows matches with DONE badge and scores
Frontend Upcoming tab shows upcoming matches with dates/venues
Clicking upcoming match navigates to Pre-Match page with team info
Pre-Match page has 'Generate Prediction' button that works via GPT
Pre-Match page has 'Go Live' button that navigates correctly
Live Match page has 'Fetch Live Scores' button that loads GPT data in ~10-15 seconds
After fetching live data: scoreboard, ball log, current players, AI analysis display correctly
Right panel tabs (Models/Odds/Squad/Players) all work correctly
Analysis page loads and shows IPL 2026 overview with statistics

success_percentage.backend: 100% (5/5 tests passed - all required APIs working)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor WebSocket console error)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (frontend properly consuming backend APIs, GPT integration working)
